Header.titles: Chemistry PhD, Master in Engineering - Chemical Engineering, and Chemical Engineer

Participation.title: Participations in Doctoral and Master's Theses

aboutUs.text: Light Mirror Tech is a spin-off founded by Jhon Mauricio Aguirre Cortés, a pioneer in the manufacture of high-quality blind spot mirrors. He currently dedicates his attention to the transformation of scientific research into tangible technological solutions for the energy transition.
aboutUs.title: About us

origin.title: Origin and Motivation
origin.text: We were born out of the need to bridge the gap between scientific application and social impact in the fields of automotive mobility, advanced materials, and emerging energy sources.

coreTech.title: Core Technology
coreTech.item1: Blind spot mirrors for the automotive sector

impact.title: Environmental and Social Impact
impact.text: We dedicate our research to reducing dependence on fossil fuels and promoting sustainable technological development.

businessModel.title: Business Model
businessModel.item1: Manufacturing and distribution of reflective surfaces

status.title: Current Status and Next Steps
status.text: Currently in the technological validation phase and prototype development. We are actively seeking strategic partners and pursuing intellectual property registration.

Metadata.title: CV - Jhon Mauricio Aguirre Cortés | EN
Metadata.description: I am a postdoctoral researcher at UCLM, where I collaborate on projects focused on the development of low-cost electrochemical sensors for the detection of polluting gases. My work focuses on the synthesis, modification and characterization of nanostructured materials such as graphene oxide, carbon nanotubes and mixed oxides of cerium and praseodymium, applied to environmental monitoring systems.
